UI.DragDropNotes: Drag and drop rarities to set their Loot Priority. The rarity at the top is the "heaviest". When a chest drops multiple items, the highest priority rarity will designate the colour of the loot beam and the drop sound!
UI.Label: Label
UI.SyncBeam: Sync Beam colour with Rarity colour
UI.PickUpHint: Played when item is added to inventory
UI.DropHint: Played when loot drops on map

Settings.PlaySoundHint: Play the assigned SFX when an item is added to an actor's inventory.
Settings.GlobalShadowHint: Applies a slight universal inner shadow (coloured by rarity) to all item icons.
Settings.DropEnableHint: If enabled, loot will drop from defeated enemies.
Settings.DropPCsHint: If enabled, PCs will also drop their loot upon death.
Settings.BeamEnableName: Enable Radial Beams for dropped loot
Settings.BeamEnableHint: Projects a rotating radial beam underneath the dropped loot token.
Settings.DropSoundEnableHint: If enabled, a sound effect will play when a chest drops on the map.
Settings.OpenSoundEnableHint: If enabled, a sound effect will play when a player opens a dropped loot token.
Settings.DeleteEmptyHint: Automatically deletes the loot actor from the canvas when the last item is taken.
Settings.DefaultImageHint: The token image used if a rarity doesn't have a specific drop icon.
Settings.DefaultNameHint: The name given to the loot token dropped on the map.
